name: Batch Processor — Loop, Transform & Collect to Slack
description: Takes a comma-separated list of items, loops over each one, uses Claude AI to transform/enrich each item, collects all results, and posts a formatted summary to Slack.

source.originalName: N8N for beginners: looping over items

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post results

items.description: Comma-separated list of items to process (e.g. 'Apple, Google, Microsoft')

transformInstruction.default: Provide a one-sentence summary of what this company does and its main product.
transformInstruction.description: What Claude should do with each item

code.source:
const items = $.input.items.split(',').map(function(s) { return s.trim(); }).filter(Boolean);
return { items, count: items.length };

steps.name: Loop over each item and transform with AI

bash.command: echo "Process this item and follow the instruction below.\nITEM: $(cat /tmp/one-batch-item-prompt.txt)\nINSTRUCTION: Return a JSON object with keys 'item' (the original item name) and 'result' (your response). Return ONLY valid JSON." | claude --print -

steps.name: Collect all loop results into summary
